name: ai-account-pool-x
description: 基于 IMAP 邮箱批量注册多平台账号（如 OpenAI Codex），集中管理账号池，并支持与 NEW API 对接同步 | IMAP-based batch signup, account pool & NEW API sync

scripts.install:all: pnpm run install:frontend && pnpm run install:backend
scripts.kill:backend: lsof -ti:1455 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Port 1455 is free'
scripts.kill:frontend: lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Port 3000 is free'
